Hero.sub: We build agents, apps and systems that used to take months, now in days. No giant teams. No bureaucracy. No fluff.

Services.label: [ 01 · Services ]
Services.titlePrefix: Three ways to give your business
Services.s1Desc: MVPs in 2-4 weeks. Full products in months, not years. We use AI at every step — from design to deploy.
Services.s2Desc: We connect your scattered sources (CRM, ERP, Excel, APIs) and turn them into AI dashboards that explain what's happening and what to do.
Services.s3Desc: We integrate AI into your apps and processes so your team can focus on what matters. Agents, automated flows and connectors with your stack.

Projects.label: [ 02 · In progress ]
Projects.clubmaDesc: Complete platform for intelligent management of clubs and communities. Members, events, payments and metrics in one place.
Projects.tourmateDesc: The app that turns every trip into an AI-guided experience. Smart itineraries, virtual travel companion, real-time discoveries.
Projects.clinicaDesc: App and management system for aesthetic clinics. Online bookings, client history, automatic reminders and post-treatment follow-up.

Process.label: [ 03 · How we work with you ]
Process.step1Desc: A 30-min call. You tell me your problem, your process, your dream. No jargon. No endless forms.
Process.step2Desc: Design + development in parallel, with AI accelerating every step. A working prototype, not mockups. You test it as we build it.
Process.step3Desc: Deploy to production, connection to your channels, monitoring. Results from day one. Continuous iteration based on real feedback.

Pillars.sub: Tailored to you. Ready to work.
Pillars.p1Desc: Qualifies leads, handles objections and closes sales — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. No human intervention needed.
Pillars.p2Desc: Receive automatic sales summaries, key alerts and important metrics — straight to your WhatsApp or email, when you need them.
Pillars.p3Headline: Your team focused on what matters.
Pillars.p3Desc: The agent handles the repetitive stuff — processes, follow-ups, integrations — so your team spends time on what really moves the business.

AgenteLive.label: [ 02 · Live Agent ]
AgenteLive.f1Desc: No need to talk to it like a robot.
AgenteLive.f3Desc: Books appointments, charges, sends. Doesn't just answer — it acts.
AgenteLive.f4Title: Alerts the team when it matters
AgenteLive.f4Desc: Detects when to escalate to a human.
AgenteLive.msg1: Hi! I'm interested in learning about the facial cleansing treatment 😊
AgenteLive.msg2: Hello! The deep cleansing includes extraction, hydration and a mask. It lasts 60 min. Would you like to know the price?
AgenteLive.msg3: Yes, how much does it cost?
AgenteLive.msg4: It's €65. I have availability this week. When works best for you?
AgenteLive.msg6: ✅ Appointment confirmed! Thursday at 17:00. I'll remind you the day before 🎉

HowItWorks.sub: No bureaucracy, no huge teams, no months of waiting. A straightforward process designed so you see value fast.
HowItWorks.s1Desc: You tell me which process you want to automate, what problem you have, or what opportunity you want to capture. No jargon. You speak about your business, I understand the rest.
HowItWorks.s1Detail: 30-minute meeting via WhatsApp or video call.
HowItWorks.s2Desc: I map the complete flow, choose the right tools and build the agent tailored to your stack, your customers and your way of working. Nothing generic.
HowItWorks.s3Desc: We deploy the agent to production, connect it to your channels (WhatsApp, email, web, CRM) and monitor it. You see results from day one.

FinalCTA.sub: The first conversation is free. You tell me about your business and I'll give you a concrete plan of what an agent can achieve for you.
FinalCTA.disclaimer: No commitment · Reply in minutes · 100% direct

CTA.titleEm: Let's make it real this week.
CTA.sub: Message us on WhatsApp for an instant reply, or leave us a message if you prefer email. The first conversation is always free and straight to the point.
CTA.opt4: Not sure yet, help me out
CTA.successSub: We'll contact you within 24 hours. Keep an eye on your inbox.

Blog.sub: Real cases, practical guides and thoughts on AI, automation and software development at impossible speed.
Blog.postCtaTitle: Want to implement this in your business?
Blog.postCtaSub: We build agents, apps and dashboards in weeks.
